option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --launchTarget forge_userdev_data --assetIndex 17 --assetsDir /home/nils/.gradle/caches/forge_gradle/assets --gameDir . --mod cheap_craftable_gunpowder --all --output "/home/nils/bin/programming/java/minecraft/fabric/cheap craftable gunpowder/src/generated/resources" --existing "/home/nils/bin/programming/java/minecraft/fabric/cheap craftable gunpowder/src/main/resources"
